,"service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这个人太懒啦，还没有设置个人简介～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxU4x2cr/1Jb7vANsT+p9AUlRr8MnJI8CeB0mySlC9Yu","gender":0,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1424566209484020","user_name":"用户14245662"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1424566209484020","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7508305631145643070","book_info":{"abstract":"【游戏入侵+末世+空间+囤货+升级流+玩家交易】
末世游戏降临后，苏念发现自己成了一本书里的女炮灰。
母亲遗物被强占，弟弟被害惨死。
只因为她想报复的对象是女主，所以就被打了恶毒女配的标签。
亲朋好友全都视她如蛇蝎。
既如此，她就让这些人看看，什么才叫恶毒。
重活一次，苏念手刃杀害弟弟的继母。
女主有光环不好杀？
那女主的机缘有一样她抢一样，没得抢了，就拿女主当出气筒，坚决把坏人标签贯彻到底！
不过跟女主相爱相杀的男主，怎么偏要来给她当小弟？
哥们儿，拿错剧本了吧？
……
本书剧情向，感情戏份不多。
女主不是独狼，游戏有很多副本需要团队合作，但女主从来不是吃亏的性格，没有得到女主认可前，大多都是工具人。
蓝星只是新手村，后期会有更多的地图和世界。

:0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14723,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":30490},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7530074402631074585","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情速度可以，打怪升级也没有雷点（不像超强或者压等级的文），人物塑造也有形象点，抢机缘这个题材半新不旧，整体不错。
【仅代表个人观点】关于女主，前面我都觉得还好，人情世故交换物资大方一点可以，到60多章那里，不说重来一次会不会“超厉害”，单警惕这一点就有点踩雷了[偷笑]末世了，宝，作者大大可以把这点打磨一下哦～","text_exts":[{"e":85,"s":81,"text":"人情世故","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%BA%E6%83%85%E4%B8%96%E6%95%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742485652D57D121%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227530074402631074585%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227508305631145643070%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%BA%E6%83%85%E4%B8%96%E6%95%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753239947,"group_id":"7508305631145643070","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"书荒了，求推书😇","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N45yCN6+t4CgaPIhgDEbegwInpIGulHpNtM7a7A99kQ0","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e4fdc6b8c2e34b0a91359767551aefa6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788437&x-signature=vbbXTuFgXB%2BfdgdSxkCl3MSn%2BTM%3D","user_id":"2990323201224509","user_name":"璃鱼浅戈i"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2990323201224509","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1734210316,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_tit
